inputs.description: Confluence username — your P&G email address (e.g., firstname.lastname@pg.com). See .github/skills/aie-sre-onboarding/PREREQUISITES.md section 'Confluence' for details.
Confluence API token — create at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. See .github/skills/aie-sre-onboarding/PREREQUISITES.md section 'Confluence'.
Spyglass Basic-auth key — base64 of 'user:pass'. Run: printf 'user:pass' | base64. See .github/skills/aie-sre-onboarding/PREREQUISITES.md section 'Spyglass'.
Spyglass APIM subscription key — provided by the AIE SRE lead. See .github/skills/aie-sre-onboarding/PREREQUISITES.md section 'Spyglass'.

GitHub fine-grained PAT — scoped to de-cf-chatpg-{core,agents,infra} in the procter-gamble org, with SSO authorized. Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens?type=beta. See .github/skills/aie-sre-onboarding/PREREQUISITES.md section 'GitHub'.
